title: Imagine Report
description: Output of the Imagine agent (experimental mode). Read by Compose in place of search-report.json. Compose picks ONE seed and develops it.

picked_by.description: How this provocation was selected — usually 'hash(project_id) % length' for deterministic re-rolls per cycle.

informed_by_human_signals.description: Project IDs whose human-review.md weighted this cycle's seeds.

anti_patterns_observed.description: Patterns from past rejections this cycle is consciously avoiding.

working_name.description: Tentative name. Compose may rename. Follow DIRECTION.md naming rules even here.

premise.description: 1–3 sentences. The protocol in plain English. What it is, who interacts with it, why it exists.

why_interesting.description: What makes this seed worth developing. Honest — if it's a long shot, say so.

fetish_hint.description: Optional: a candidate physical object the brand might return to.

world_hint.description: Optional: a candidate world / fiction the site might be set in.

stack_recommendation.description: Same shape as search-report's stack_recommendation. Defaults are fine — experimental cycles rarely need exotic stacks.
